race.comment: RUTHLESS BLOOM (9) trialled well coming into his fresh effort and was solid from the back of the pack there, finishing 2.1L off the winner. CJP hops on board now with the fresh run under her belt and she should be better for the fresh run. Can raise the bar again now. TAG TIME (2) gets Pike on board today following some nice trials coming into this. The inside barrier is a big tick for his chances and 1300m fresh looks a good move. Can return on a winning note. CALL ME INVINCIBLE (1) is racing in good order and Brad Parnham sticks in what looks a suitable event./ Should lob in a midfield position and with the race fitness under his belt, he can make his presence felt. SMILING WAR BANDIT (5) is third-up now and showed good improvement over this track and trip last time out. Can improve again. LATORIO (7) can improve getting out in trip second-up.
